Structured Surface Matrix

Source: R/surface-utils.R
surface_matrix.Rd

Create a structured surface-grid object from a numeric matrix. Rows map to y, columns map to x, and the matrix values map to z.

Usage

surface_matrix(z, x = NULL, y = NULL)

Arguments

z

Numeric matrix of height values.

x

Optional x-coordinate vector with one value per matrix column.

y

Optional y-coordinate vector with one value per matrix row.

Value

A ggwebgl_surface_matrix object accepted by ggwebgl_layer_surface().

Examples

surface_matrix(volcano[1:3, 1:3])
#> $z
#>      [,1] [,2] [,3]
#> [1,]  100  100  101
#> [2,]  101  101  102
#> [3,]  102  102  103
#> 
#> $x
#> [1] 1 2 3
#> 
#> $y
#> [1] 1 2 3
#> 
#> $nrow
#> [1] 3
#> 
#> $ncol
#> [1] 3
#> 
#> attr(,"class")
#> [1] "ggwebgl_surface_matrix" "list"
